## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` produces no changes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` introduces no new warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cd apps/web && npm run build` passes (if frontend touched)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for my change
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and are scoped to a single change
